allow: Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec namenode hdfs dfs -ls /data/nyc-taxi/raw/)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec -T spark-master spark-submit --master 'local[*]' /opt/spark-jobs/utils/parquet_to_csv.py)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec namenode hdfs dfs -ls /data/nyc-taxi/csv/)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec namenode bash -c "hdfs dfs -cat /data/nyc-taxi/csv/part-00000* 2>/dev/null | head -3")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec namenode bash -c "hdfs dfs -cat /data/nyc-taxi/csv/part-00000* 2>/dev/null | head -20 | python3 /opt/mapreduce/mapper_zone_aggregation.py")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec namenode bash -c "hdfs dfs -ls /data/nyc-taxi/output/zone-agg-20260407231007/ && echo --- && hdfs dfs -cat /data/nyc-taxi/output/zone-agg-20260407231007/part-00000 2>/dev/null | head -10")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec namenode hdfs dfs -ls /data/nyc-taxi/raw/)
